highlight: Initial public launch — gross-to-net salary calculator for 21 countries with expat and special-regime variants
improvements: Side-by-side multi-country comparison lets you add up to several destinations and see net salary, effective rate, and tax breakdown for each at a glance
Salary range chart shows how your effective and marginal tax rates shift as income rises, so you can see where the next bracket kicks in
Tax breakdown displays each component — income tax, social contributions, and credits — separately so you can see exactly where the money goes
Calculation history saves past results locally in the browser, with search and the ability to name and annotate entries
Shareable URLs encode the full calculator state so you can send a link and others see the same countries, gross salary, and variant you configured
Currency normalisation converts net salaries from different countries into a common currency for apples-to-apples comparison
Best-destination highlight automatically marks the country with the highest net take-home in a comparison
All 50 US states and DC are supported via the state-tax input, covering both federal and state income tax
All 13 Canadian provinces and territories are available as variants, each with the correct provincial tax brackets
Germany supports per-state church-tax and Solidaritätszuschlag calculations across all 16 Bundesländer
Config-driven YAML engine means tax rules are community-maintainable and auditable without changing application code
